forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+color: D6409F
+description: Invert the skills→mirdan edge so mirdan can own install/init outright (option B). One profile-driven init/deinit in mirdan; every CLI (sah, shelltool, kanban-cli, code-context) and the kanban desktop app declares a Profile {served tool, skills, agents} and calls the one installer. Delete swissarmyhammer-workspace-init and all per-app SkillDeployment/render/register duplication. mirdan's store+symlink deploy becomes the single mechanism.
+name: Consolidate Init/Install in mirdan
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-color: D6409F
-description: Invert the skills→mirdan edge so mirdan can own install/init outright (option B). One profile-driven init/deinit in mirdan; every CLI (sah, shelltool, kanban-cli, code-context) and the kanban desktop app declares a Profile {served tool, skills, agents} and calls the one installer. Delete swissarmyhammer-workspace-init and all per-app SkillDeployment/render/register duplication. mirdan's store+symlink deploy becomes the single mechanism.
-name: Consolidate Init/Install in mirdan
